source: C2SP/CCTV ed25519vectors.json (github.com/C2SP/CCTV, main HEAD as of 2026-06-01; file last changed in commit 0fb2c3b5, 2023-04-01). expected_valid is the PyNaCl/libsodium strict (non-cofactored, RFC 8032 §5.1.7) verification consensus, which equals ed25519-dalek verify_strict on all 914 vectors. message_hex is the UTF-8 encoding of the corpus 'msg' field.
